creator: eric@madrid.lol
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #7)

ok, I copied and pasted the patch-v2/patch-SConstruct to files/patch-SConstruct
now I get:

=> SHA256 Checksum OK for mongodb-src-r4.0.5.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for mongodb40-4.0.5

File to patch:

I am not sure what file/patch this is asking for.

Eric
